web.title: CARTO is now part of the Github Student Developer Pack!
web.description: CARTO is now part of the Github Student Developer Pack! Empowering student developers with cutting-edge location intelligence tools.
web.markdown:
Summary

CARTO is now part of the Github Student Developer Pack! Empowering student developers with cutting-edge location intelligence tools.

This post may describe functionality for an old version of CARTO. Find out about the latest and cloud-native version [here.](https://carto.com/platform)

This post may describe functionality for an old version of CARTO. Find out about the latest and cloud-native version [here.](https://carto.com/platform)

![CARTO is now part of the Github Student Developer Pack!](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63483ad423421bd16e7a7ae7/63a167681daf14ce5e113a4d_github.jpeg)

If you are a student developer looking to work with cutting-edge location intelligence tools, then do we have good news for you!

Engaging with students interested in location data and spatial analytics is one of the most rewarding features of working at a company committed to democratizing access to location intelligence. CARTO empowers the next generation of developers, analysts, and mappers, but we also learn a ton from engaging with up-and-coming developers. To continue fostering this relation, we're excited to join [GitHub's Student Developer Pack](https://education.github.com/pack)  a service providing access to the latest tools from industry leaders for free!

We are so proud to join the amazing community Github has assembled, while also continuing to help current and future students. Within the Student Developer Pack, CARTO provides resources that introduce our platform’s services like [CARTO Academy](https://academy.carto.com/)

Are you a student developer interested in location intelligence? Join GitHub’s Student Developer Pack and learn about our platform for free!  [Sign up today!](https://education.github.com/pack)

A student with a Github-verified student account can sign up for a CARTO account and receive an upgraded, database storage as well as all the bells and whistles needed to take your geospatial project to the next level.

Stay tuned to learn more about how we're empowering students and educators.

_Happy Data Mapping!_

Don’t forget to share this post on [Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/company/carto "Linkedin")!

About the author

![](https://carto.com/blog/carto-is-part-of-the-github-student-pack)

[More Posts from](https://carto.com/blog/carto-is-part-of-the-github-student-pack#)

About the author

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6345207a1b18e581fcf67604/643544577999656278946293_carto-symbol.svg)

Provided by our community, industry experts, or the CARTO Team, these blog posts cover the entire spectrum of spatial analysis. From location intelligence to GIS, spatial data science, industry trends, and much more, we’ve crafted relevant content to accompany you at every stage of your journey, whether you have a technical or business background. With our Blog, you are one step closer to taking spatial analysis to the next level.

[**CARTO AI Agents now integrated with Amazon Bedrock** \\
Unlock secure, AI-powered geospatial analysis in your AWS environment. Learn how CARTO's Agentic GIS and Amazon Bedrock integration makes spatial insights accessible to everyone.](https://carto.com/blog/carto-ai-agents-now-now-integrated-with-amazon-bedrock) [News](https://carto.com/categories/news)

## Ready to optimize your territories with Location Intelligence?

[Request live demo](https://carto.com/request-live-demo/)
